name: Taliang Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Taliang Technology Co., Ltd. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells semiconductor inspection, resin panel cutters, and CNC engraving and milling machines in Taiwan. It provides optoelectronics, including glass panel processing machinery for touch panel, cover glass, sensor glass, or one glass processing applications; automatic edge coating machines; and PCB routing and drilling machines. The company also offers semiconductor inspection solution comprising FVI for carrier tape inspection; IR reel, semi-auto IR, and IR wafer for sidewall chipping around the die inspection; PRIM HBM for HBM chip type in reel inspection; wafer map that replaces human eye inspection of map; and testing handler for QFN/DFN/SOT/SOP IC inspection and packaging. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
